metadata.scope_statement: This is composition-CELL gap-filling (a missing/ambiguous cell of an EXACT qualitative or kinship composition table filled by a probabilistic LLM read). It is NOT OpenCyc/upper-ontology grounding and NOT general fuzzy unification; both are out of scope.

symbolic_abstain.note: ambiguous under the full table -> abstains by construction

Shantel was so proud of her daughter Marie for getting straight A's this semester. Dorothy and her son James went shopping to get Dorothy 'husband Pedro a birthday gift yesterday.

honesty_caveats: CLUTRR is a TEMPLATED kinship benchmark (max 871 chars), not natural text
gaps are composition CELLS, not ontology/common-sense grounding
manufactured gaps are clearly labelled and separated from natural gaps
a non-sound LLM fill is the silent-wrong-narrowing failure mode -> reported as confident-wrong
Mode-S and the raw_llm baseline see the same story; the neuro-symbolic system invokes the LLM ONLY on gap cells and uses the exact table elsewhere

budget.note: cumulative_usd is THIS invocation's marginal cost (0 when fully cache-served); total_api_spend_all_runs_usd is the real money spent to build the sha256 cache, which makes the experiment reproducible at $0.

verdict.summary: LLM abstract composition-cell exact-match falls with algebra richness (point=0.67/3rels, rcc8=0.52/8rels, allen=0.38/13rels; allen soundness only 0.44), so an LLM composes RICH algebras poorly and a non-sound fill is a silent-wrong-narrowing hazard. on CLUTRR kinship -- where the LLM knows the composition calculus (Mode-P cell accuracy 1.0) -- CELL-level gap-filling (symbolic does the multi-hop chaining, the LLM supplies only the missing atomic rule) recovers gap coverage at precision=1.00 (net +391), verdict=YES. by contrast STORY-level filling (asking the LLM to do the multi-hop read) recovers at only precision=0.33 (net -133) -- naive story gap-fill is NOT net-faithful. the cell-fill neuro-symbolic system cuts the confident-wrong (hallucination) rate by 100% vs the raw-LLM CoT baseline (0.522 -> 0.000) at FULL coverage.
